pages.text: Oyisa loves to eat all kinds of fruit. She eats pears, grapes, oranges, and watermelon.

blocks.text: Oyisa loves to eat all kinds of fruit. She eats pears, grapes, oranges, and watermelon.

pages.text: She can eat a whole lot of fruit in no time at all.

blocks.text: She can eat a whole lot of fruit in no time at all.

pages.text: But she doesn’t like the seeds. They get stuck in her teeth and taste bitter. Yuck!

blocks.text: But she doesn’t like the seeds.
They get stuck in her teeth and taste bitter. Yuck!

pages.text: Today, she’s eating a delicious, juicy pear. She spits the seeds out on the ground.

blocks.text: Today, she’s eating a delicious, juicy pear. She spits the seeds out on the ground.

pages.text: A plant begins to grow between her feet. That’s strange, thinks Oyisa. What’s going on here?

blocks.text: A plant begins to grow between her feet.
That’s strange, thinks Oyisa. What’s going on here?

pages.text: Suddenly, a tree shoots up high – with Oyisa perched on top! Oyisa needs to find a way down.

blocks.text: Suddenly, a tree shoots up high – with Oyisa perched on top!

pages.text: She swiiiiinggs to the next branch and meets a bird.

blocks.text: She swiiiiinggs to the next branch and meets a bird.

pages.text: The bird wants to build a cosy nest in her hair. “No way, Mr Bird!”

blocks.text: The bird wants to build a cosy nest in her hair.
“No way, Mr Bird!”

pages.text: On her way down, she spies a giant pear and climbs onto it. It sways in different directions, and this is the best feeling in the world!

blocks.text: On her way down, she spies a giant pear and climbs onto it.
It sways in different directions, and this is the best feeling in the world!

pages.text: “Oyisaaaa! your bath,” Mama It’s time calls. for “I’m coming!” shouts Oyisa from the tree.

shouts Oyisa from the tree.

pages.text: What an adventure! Oyisa decides to start collecting seeds. Who knows what magic lies inside them?
